title: haplophyllum rotundifolium
intro: Haplophyllum rotundifolium, also known as the 'Round Leafed Tree Madder', is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Haplophyllum rotundifolium include treating various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its potential in reducing stress and anxiety. Herbal preparations of Haplophyllum rotundifolium can be found in the form of infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine.
